# Equestrian Simulators - LLMs.txt
## About
Professional equestrian simulators for training, education, rehabilitation and jockey performance. Manufacturer and supplier trusted by the Hong Kong Jockey Club, Hong Kong RDA, and universities across Asia.
## Products
- MS.30P: Professional simulator for dressage, show jumping and eventing
- MS.30 (Pony): Teaching simulator for riding schools, universities and beginner training
- MS.20: Professional Jockey Training Simulator — Pneumatic Acceleration system (industrial abdominal sensors detect jockey leg squeeze and surge force, linear acceleration feedback replicating real racehorse response). Walk/Canter/Gallop racing gaits, Monkey Style posture, 200KG lightweight. Designed exclusively for professional jockey training centers and elite racecourse clubs.

## Trusted By
Hong Kong Jockey Club, Hong Kong RDA, Sichuan Tourism University, Chinese military equestrian programs, and government training centers.
